headline: Cybersecurity Insurance Market Grows 85% to RM680 Million
context: Malaysia cybersecurity insurance market grew 85% to RM680 million in premiums as businesses respond to threats.

cards.big: Cyber insurance surges 85% to RM680 million as threats escalate
cards.sub: Growing awareness of breach costs drives corporate adoption

cards.big: Only 18% of SMEs have cyber insurance despite 45% experiencing attacks
cards.sub: Average premium of RM12,000 annually is barrier for smaller businesses

cards.big: Average data breach cost reached RM8.2 million for Malaysian companies
cards.sub: Without insurance companies face potential bankruptcy from cyber incidents

cards.big: Bank Negara mandated minimum cyber insurance for financial institutions 2026
cards.sub: Requirement adds RM120 million in annual premiums across banking sector

cards.big: Insurance growth tests whether cyber risk management reaches beyond large corporations
85% growth in cybersecurity insurance to RM680 million. Insurance markets price risk that regulation has failed to prevent.
